docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DEFENDANT KRISTEN MCGUIRE'S HUSBAND FILED BY DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN KEMPAINEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KRISTEN MCGUIRE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE, HUSBAND. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEMPAINEN, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J. $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KEMPAINEN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEMPAINEN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEMPAINEN, STEPHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-20-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ADAM MCGUIRE SERVED FEB-26-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY KEMPAINEN, STEPHEN MCGUIRE, ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE, KRISTEN J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2025 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-09-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE ON THE HEARING DATE WILL BE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STEPHEN KEMPAINEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ADAM MAXWELL MCGUIRE AND KRISTEN J. MCGUIRE ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
